decisions: Approve the submission of LHA 2023-03 to HUD (unanimously approved)
Approve of the change and submission of LHA 2023-02 (2023-2027) update to HUD (unanimously approved)
raw_text:
Housing Authority of the City of College Park

Board Minutes
Special Board Meeting

March 2, 2023

Present: Chairperson, Arelis Perez;
Vice Chairperson, Robert Catlin;
Commissioners, Theresa Keeler, Victoria Evans, and
James McFadden;
Executive Director, Michelle Johnson;

I. Roll Call:

Ms. Perez opened the meeting at 10:03 a.m. All Commissioners were present.

it. Resolution LHA 2023-03:

The Board reviewed/discussed the Resolution LHA 2023-03 (Capital fund/Budget). A motion was
made by Ms. Perez and seconded by Ms. Evans to approve of the submission of LHA 2023-03 to HUD.
Robert Catlin, Victoria Evans, Theresa Keeler, James McFadden, and Arelis Perez voted for the motion.
The motion was unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0.

it. Resolution LHA 2023-02 (2023-2027) update:

~
The Board reviewed/discussed the update to Resolution LHA 2023-02 (2023-2027). A motion was
made by Ms. Perez and seconded by Ms. Evans to approve of the change and submission of LH
2023-02 (2023-2027) update to HUD. It should be noted that this update will occur every fiscal
